---
title: "Games crash with new monitor"
date: 2006-12-26
forum: Gaming &amp; Leisure
---

### Post by DSn0wMan on 2006-12-26
I just bought a 19" wide screen monitor with DVI. I am using a GForce FX550 with nvidia beta drivers. 

Everything works fine except my games (legends, and nexuiz). Does anyone have a clue to why this might happen?

```

	Monitor		"acer AL1917W"

	Mode	0666
```

---

### Post by DSn0wMan on 2006-12-26
I found a driver update, by adding a different repo. This seems to have fixed the issue.

btw - it still only works on 1280 X 800, but not my max res. of 1490 x 900

---

### Post by slimdog360 on 2006-12-27
Your graphic card probably is having trouble driving the monitor at that resolution and refresh rate which would explain the crashes (and why the new drivers fixed it). If I had to guess Id say your graphics card doesnt support that resolution all together, unless it works in that resolution on your normal desktop.

solution = new graphics card

---
